<li>Diodes incorporated - Maria Rodrigues (receptionist) called poonam bohara asking if she would see us but over the speaker Poonam is not hiring but asked for our card. Also interesting tidbit is that Maria Rodrigues used to use Slingshot Connections in the past and liked us. She remembered Jennifer </li>
<li>Mks - Mimi Nguyen </li>
<li>Venture - Jennifer nhin - mentioned that 2 other locations closed down due to the business not doing that well but she asked for our business card </li>
